reviews.review_description: Apart from the Relix coaster app, this is the best for giving you a sense of movement. However, there is no interesting scenery as such. There's no story. It's not an app you could play more than once. I took a punt and yes the graphics are good, it ran smoothly, but it just lacked imagination and creativity. I want more story, more experience

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed our RollerCoaster rides. If you are looking for more narrative please feel free to download our Sneaky Bears app which has more story line and will give some background to the RollerCoaster. Thanks for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: Very weak. You see only once and you do not want to see more. Money thrown away.
Good if its free. This is only about half as good as Rilix which comes free. Should give us paid customer a better deal or upgrade that is better then Rilix.
This is not a roller coast is more like a rolling Treadmill and we get nauseous.

It's one of the best rollercoaster app in VR. 
There are three stages each stage plays two times and it suddenly runs very fast which feels pretty much great. It's more like you're on a conveyor belt with no safety. Graphics itself no doubt are perfect. And to the people giving bad reviews and saying don't waste money, like come on you can't expect horror and creep factor in every rollercoaster app. Give young kids a try to experience it too. It's only 1.99. Developers deserve good reviews and thumbs up. Please make more apps like this. Would definitely try them out. Enjoy! (S7edge).

developer_response.body: We're all thrilled you enjoyed our RollerCoaster app Naveeh, thanks so much for the positive feedback. We have also released a game called Sneaky Bears which we think you might enjoy. It has more narrative and gives some background to the factory. Thanks again for your support, The WarDucks Team.

reviews.review_description: Best rollercoaster available in virtual reality. So much fun. Thrilling experience that is well polushed with amazing visuals.
good idea and nice graphics, there has 3 scene in the game , experience good, but a little broing, i need more adventrue !

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed the concept and the graphics. Thanks for the feedback!

reviews.review_description: Sneaky Bears RollerCoaster is a great fast action VR Roller coaster ride. The first ride is calm with less fast action. The next two rides are crazily fast and enjoyable. The sound effects are great. It's miles cheaper than going on a real roller coaster!

Slows down way too many times during a ride. In bearable and extreme tracks all those stops suck. you pick up speed and slow down and it's the same over and over it's not intense at all. I find it a joke that it's classified as INTENSE comfort. I could see that if it didn't slow down every 3 seconds of ride.feeling of Motion is great but that's it. Those slowdowns and stops as frequent as they currently are RUIN THE RIDE.
Excellent  coaster game my daughter enjoyed it very much .. hope u do more stages with twist and turns etc .. plus make it faster lol
Very short and boring. You ride around in a big room on a roller coaster and that’s about it, the end.
